# Introduction

This document uses the `forgr:` namespace to control every rendering option. It should render with the **academic** preset, section numbering, a cover page, and "Index" as the table of contents title.

## Conclusion

This demonstration confirms that the academic preset with section numbering and a table of contents renders correctly using the `forgr:` front-matter namespace.
